{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "f0573dcb",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Kernel Implementations\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "4b6a6a95",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import os\n",
    "os.environ[\"JAX_ENABLE_X64\"] = \"True\"\n",
    "os.environ[\"JAX_PLATFORMS\"] = \"gpu\"\n",
    "\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import sys\n",
    "import time\n",
    "sys.path.append(\"../..\")\n",
    "\n",
    "from src_jax.analytic_kernel import AnalyticKernel\n",
    "from src_jax.numerical_kernel import NumericalKernel"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "92602d37",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### Compare numerical and analytic approaches to computing the kernel"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "831dbbb9",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "theta_full = dict(peq=3.0, \n",
    "                  kappa=0.3, \n",
    "                  inc=np.pi/2, \n",
    "                  nspot=40,\n",
    "                  lspot=10.0, \n",
    "                  tau=5.0, \n",
    "                  alpha_max=0.05, \n",
    "                  fspot=0.)\n",
    "\n",
    "tlags = np.arange(0, 20, 0.1)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "6c5fb65a",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "numerical computation time: 0.783\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "TSIM = 300.0    # time baseline for lightcurve simulations (used for numerical kernel computation)\n",
    "TSAMP = 0.1     # time sampling for lightcurve simulations (used for numerical kernel computation)\n",
    "NSIM = 300      # number of lightcurve simulations to average over (used for numerical kernel computation)\n",
    "\n",
    "# compute the autocorrelation function (ACF) of the lightcurve simulations\n",
    "t0_num = time.time()\n",
    "\n",
    "nk = NumericalKernel(theta_full, tsim=TSIM, tsamp=TSAMP, nsim=NSIM, verbose=False)\n",
    "\n",
    "acf_num = nk.kernel(tlags)\n",
    "tf_num = time.time() - t0_num\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\"numerical computation time: {tf_num:.3f}\")\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 12,
   "id": "d7c971be",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "analytic computation time: 0.238\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# compute the ACF using the analytical kernel model \n",
    "t0_ana = time.time()\n",
    "\n",
    "# compute kernel analytically using up to n_harmonics spherical harmonics \n",
    "# and integrate over n_lat latitudes in the range lat_range using the specified quadrature method (default \"trapezoid\")\n",
    "ak = AnalyticKernel(theta_full, n_harmonics=3, n_lat=64, lat_range=(-np.pi/2, np.pi/2), quadrature=\"trapezoid\")\n",
    "\n",
    "acf_ana = ak.kernel(tlags)\n",
    "acf_ana = acf_ana / acf_ana[0]  # normalize\n",
    "tf_ana = time.time() - t0_ana\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\"analytic computation time: {tf_ana:.3f}\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 13,
   "id": "9f6c9326",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "plt.plot(tlags, acf_num, label=\"Numerical ACF\")\n",
    "plt.plot(tlags, acf_ana, label=\"Analytical ACF\")\n",
    "for ii in range(1, 10):\n",
    "    plt.axvline(ii * theta_full[\"peq\"], color='gray', ls='--', alpha=0.6)\n",
    "plt.axhline(0, color='gray', ls='--', alpha=0.6)\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Time lag\", fontsize=20)\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"Autocorrelation function\", fontsize=20)\n",
    "plt.legend(loc=\"upper right\", fontsize=18)\n",
    "plt.xlim(min(tlags), max(tlags))\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
